title: Craftable E-Gaps
body:
Want to be immortal? 

Well this mod can "help" with that (kinda) 

 This mod makes Enchanted Golden Apples craftable using 1 golden apple, 4 gold blocks, and 4 bottles of enchanting.
 ![4 gold blocks and xp bottles surrounding a golden apple = enchanted gold apple](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/onOoBe5Z/images/1b4acf0cb46b2c43eaacbe33585a93c4a0711ce4.png)

 I made a discord server you can join if you want [https://discord.gg/UbPywERWPC](https://discord.gg/UbPywERWPC)
